- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Publish
  condition: and(succeeded(), ne('${{ parameters.publishProjects }}', ''))
  inputs:
    targetType: inline
    script: |
      $projectPath = "src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj"

      Write-Host "Publishing project:"
      Write-Host $projectPath

      dotnet publish $projectPath `
        --configuration ${{ parameters.buildConfiguration }} `
        --framework net8.0 `
        --output "$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)"
